title: rubus heteracanthophorus
intro: Rubus heteracanthophorus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. It is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Rubus heteracanthophorus is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
